specific_promise: The reader will learn what makes this reference structurally different from other herb guides — specifically that it starts with dosing, interactions, and safety (where other guides stop).
delivery_test: The body must demonstrate at least one concrete structural difference between this handbook and typical herb guides (e.g., dosing ranges by form, interaction flags, safety-first organization) within the first 400 words.
minimum_delivery: Begin in Section 1 (Hero sub-head). Substantially resolved by Section 3 (Mechanism + Comparison).
